text: In this moment, I sense both curiosity and anticipation. The first scene, with its pristine glass walls and modern, quiet design, feels almost like a threshold to knowledge—a liminal space inviting me onwards. Entering the vibrant, information-rich R+D area, I am struck by a pulse of inspiration. Surrounded by the language of science and innovation, I feel a spark: here, ideas are actively taking shape, and I am eager to explore and understand. The juxtaposition of calm and creativity heightens my awareness of being part of an ongoing intellectual journey.
